name: AmadeusClosestAirport
description: Finds the closest airport to a given location. Provide a location (city name or physical address) and the tool returns the nearest IATA airport code, airport name, and distance from the location. Useful for travel planning and flight search.

location.description: A city name or physical address to search near, e.g. 'Cali, Colombia' or '123 Main St, Chicago, IL'.

return_type: str — IATA code, airport name, and distance in km from the provided location
